comment:
Finding a reliable landscaping company in Weatherford can be a headache, but these guys made the process for our new custom home so easy. They handled everything from the initial design to the final plant going in the ground.

We really needed a solid irrigation system to handle the Texas weather, and the sprinkler system they installed is perfect. They even handled all the city permits for the irrigation, which took a huge weight off our shoulders. The system includes a WiFi controller so I can adjust the zones right from my phone.

They also did an incredible job with the hardscaping, specifically the walking path from our driveway to the front door. They used a mix of Arizona river rock, mulch, and ground cover for the landscaping. My favorite part is the native plants. They put in over 100 of them including some massive agaves, and 6 new trees. If you want a team that knows their plants but also understands the technical side of sprinkler installation, is this the crew to call.
draft_response: We appreciate you taking the time, Kyle. Your feedback on the tree work is exactly the kind of detail that helps us maintain the Black Hill Standard across every property. Thank you for choosing Black Hill Landscaping.
